name: Quick, Southern Style Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onions into 1/2 inch wedges.
2. Mince garlic clove.
3. Dice bell pepper.
4. Drain beans.
5. Heat water in a skillet.
6. Add onion and garlic to the skillet; cook until onion is tender but not brown, about 5 minutes.
7. Add enough water to broth to make 2 1/2 cups.
8. Add to skillet and bring to a boil.
9. Stir in rice, bacos, thyme, and salt.
10. Cover tightly and simmer for 15 minutes.
11. Add green pepper; cover and continue cooking for 5 minutes.
12. Remove from heat.
13. Stir in beans.
14. Let stand covered until all liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
